jsonLd.title: Instamojo is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Instamojo are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Instamojo:
Instamojo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Instamojo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
